title: Craft Tea!
description:
One of the best mods adding... tea!
and with it a few new mechanics, achievements, etc.
body:
![craft tea banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e91cda369e7aaabdc34c80ccfdcde5f631939403.png)   **_FORGE 1.20.1_**

![about](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fbf6c3c74b2ce9146b127194ba964a4742be7c8d.png)

This mod creates a new type of food. tea, tea is relatively easy to get. to get tea you need to find the biome "cherry grove" and in it are new plants. Tea bushes, but do not dare to break them! Because you will not get anything from them. Better take scissors and right-click on the bushes. Then you will get tea petals used in the crafting of tea itself. In total there are 4 types of tea, but in the future it is planned to make more uses with them, as well as plan to add new desserts, weapons, tools and much more. And below you can see a few recipes (not all) just install JEI and you will see all the recipes from our mod. Good luck in the game!

![recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c85506672c80dab0ab3cbf1a1116587cc381dcdb.png)

![green tea craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43cf7e4150b41e199400889e2e015728ab553f94.png) ![Manual crusher craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03988309519e4f29a7d02ed4b4f82a18b88cba1b.png)

![features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e29f437253ffdd4dc6a82a477205281dd8e86a2.png)

This sheet tells you about all the basic things

**Blocks**

+green tea bush
+yellow tea bush
+oolong tea bush
+black tea bush

**items**

+teas
+leafs
+Manual Crusher


Mod only on FORGE but in the future it is planned to add other loaders

Supported versions are:1.20.1

The mod is still in development! So wait for new versions!
